jobs.title: Exploded 3D iPhone 15 Pro Max Illustration - $100 AUD Budget
jobs.description:
-- $100 AUD Budget -- If your budget is not $100 AUD I will assume you havent read the project and your bid will be deleted.

I’m looking for a photorealistic 3D exploded render of an iPhone 15 Pro Max for use as a homepage hero image.

The screen should sit on the left side, with all internal parts “blown out” and fanning upward toward the top-right, while maintaining their true position in the device stack. This must be accurate to real assembly order, not a conceptual layout. Every part should appear once only, with no duplicates and nothing missing.

The render should be clean and premium.
